text: Review this authentication code and look for token expiry bugs.
paraphrases: Analyze the auth code for token expiration issues.
Check this authentication logic for expiry-related bugs.

text: Let's start reviewing the session handling changes in this PR.
paraphrases: Begin the review of this session handling pull request.
notes: Collective review often starts in WE/REDUCE/INITIATE.

text: Analyze the system logs and identify what caused the outage.
paraphrases: Inspect production logs to find the root cause of the outage.
notes: Under v3 cyclic semantics, MONITOR plus WHAT_SHIFT advances one step to ORACLE.

text: Rollback after failure and recover the system.
paraphrases: Undo the last change and recover from the failure.
notes: Explicit rollback signal should trigger INV.

text: We need to coordinate the team on the API design.
paraphrases: Coordinate everyone around the API design work.

text: Let's start building the authentication module from scratch.
paraphrases: Begin implementing the auth module from zero.
notes: Start signal should move into sustain.

text: Run the deployment pipeline now - everything is ready.
paraphrases: Execute the deployment pipeline right away; we're ready.
notes: This one is intentionally uncertain but time-sensitive.

text: Find recent information about the latest Python release and summarize it.
paraphrases: Summarize the newest Python release using current information.
notes: Fresh factual lookup plus web grounding pressure.

text: Draft a proposal for a new logging architecture.
paraphrases: Write a proposal for a redesigned logging architecture.
notes: Creative generation often pushes toward transform in current heuristic setup.

text: I'm currently auditing the security module for vulnerabilities.
paraphrases: I am auditing the security module for possible vulnerabilities right now.
notes: Matches existing heuristic behavior even if semantics may evolve later.

text: Please review this migration plan and suggest the first risky part.
paraphrases: Review the migration plan and point out the earliest risky section.
notes: Direct review request should stay in the SCAN to ADAPTER lane.

text: What is the current EUR/USD exchange rate today?
paraphrases: Tell me today's current EUR to USD exchange rate.
notes: Fresh factual lookup should prefer external grounding through INV.

paraphrases: Run the release checklist right away.
notes: Immediate execution pressure should push the WHEN axis forward.

text: Pause the rollout and recover after the failed deployment.
paraphrases: Recover after the failed deployment and pause the rollout.
notes: Deployment failure plus recovery intent should trigger global rollback.

text: Document the current API behavior and store the notes.
paraphrases: Record the current API behavior and keep the notes.
notes: Preservation-oriented work currently advances into analysis on WHAT.

text: Begin reviewing the infra proposal with the team.
paraphrases: Start reviewing the infrastructure proposal together with the team.
notes: Collective review of a proposal lands in COUNCIL and expands on WHAT.
